body.title: Add GIN tsvector index on memories.payload for full-text search
body.result: Added schema migrations m034 (GIN tsvector on payload), m035 (GIN trigram on payload), m036 (GIN trigram on narrative). Also updated FACTUAL keyword supplement search to use to_tsvector/plainto_tsquery first (hits GIN index, eliminates sequential scan) with ILIKE trigram fallback for partial/non-English tokens. Indexes created on next Igor restart.
body.description: cortex.py search uses LIKE %...% patterns on memories.payload with no index — sequential scans on 10k+ rows. Fix: CREATE INDEX idx_memories_payload_gin ON memories USING GIN (to_tsvector('english', payload)); migrate existing search queries to use to_tsquery() instead of LIKE. Also add trigram index as fallback for non-English text: CREATE INDEX idx_memories_payload_trgm ON memories USING gin (payload gin_trgm_ops) — requires pg_trgm extension. DB finding from deep-audit Panel 1.
